root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.used_amount , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) AS member_name_2 , 0 AS color , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_lon_m_coll_rule.percent_shareperloan_drop , 0 AS coll_current ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name, ('!member_name_1!') AS number_book , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.address , sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no , sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode , sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_coll_rule, sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_ucf_province , sc_mem_m_ucf_district
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) AND sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code = sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code AND sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code = sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code AND sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code <> '3' ) AND sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type=sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type AND
( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_coll_rule.loan_type ) AND ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no =sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) AND ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) OR ( sc_lon_m_contract.atm_status = '1' AND sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status = '0' ) ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '082834' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
